findings.title: Overdue Venue Payment
findings.why: Payment for Bella Vista Hall is overdue since 2026-06-01 and only partially paid.
findings.do: Contact Bella Vista Hall to settle outstanding payment immediately.

findings.title: Overdue Photography Payment
findings.why: Payment to Golden Hour Photography was due on 2026-06-15 and remains unpaid.
findings.do: Arrange payment to Golden Hour Photography as soon as possible.

findings.title: Duplicate Music Entries
findings.why: Two entries for DJ Amir may indicate a duplicate record with differing payment statuses.
findings.do: Verify and correct any duplicate entries for DJ Amir.

findings.title: Per-Item Overrun in Venue
findings.why: The committed cost for Bella Vista Hall exceeds the budgeted amount by $1,000.
findings.do: Either adjust the budget for Bella Vista Hall or reduce costs elsewhere.

findings.title: Missing Service Charges
findings.why: No contingency budget or service charges are accounted for catering or other categories.
findings.do: Allocate 5-10% of the total budget for contingencies and possible service charges.

findings.title: Missing Category: Favors
findings.why: No budget allocated for favors, which may lead to unplanned expenses.
findings.do: Consider setting a budget for favors.
